title: Dungeon Lord
series: The Wraith's Haunt: A LitRPG Series
author: Hugo Huesca
description: When Edward is swept into the world of Ivalis as a Dungeon Lord, the Dark's most powerful servant, he has no servitude in mind. He'll oppose the evil plans of the Dark god, Murmur, whatever it takes....

title: Cultivating Chaos
author: William D. Arand
description: Ash led a very normal life by his own standards. Right up until he was literally pulled into a portal that spat him out into another world. One that was full of martial arts. And martial artists who could use magic....

title: Cities in Chains
author: Tao Wong
description: It's been more than a year since the System came to Earth, bringing blood and monsters in equal measure. Faced with new challenges and new enemies, John steps up once more to set things right and teach a few aliens why you never put humanity in chains....

title: Conquest
author: Antony W. F. Chow
description: When 31-year-old Markos Turloch is murdered in a heinous manner by his boss, Bobbi Nox, as revenge for whistle-blowing on his employer, he loses his humanity and is reincarnated as a diamond-like dungeon core in another world....

title: The Airship: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma is back! The core has been transferred to an airship crashed deep on the Rim. There, Emma and Anna will encounter feuding factions, terrifying monstrosities, and new powered foes....

title: The District: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma has gained control of one district of a city run by a woman that she tried to kill. While her new position has improved her upgrade abilities the other district heads have had theirs enhanced as well....

title: The Province: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma has attained new heights in the Scholarium, and while that provides countless new opportunities for research, it also means things have never been more perilous. Alliances will be forged and broken when a new war with the Righteous ignites....

title: The Nation: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma awoke in a broken Earth, but now rules over much of one restored. The restoration of the planet has left old nations broken and scattered and allowed those hungry for power to rise up. New advances will offer Emma all-new ways to abuse her power....

title: The Planet: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: Emma and Anna may have defeated the last foe to their Empire on Earth, but at a terrible price. The planet's atmosphere has largely burned off, and the remaining ecosystems are on the verge of total collapse....

title: The System: A Futuristic Dungeon Core
author: Skyler Grant
description: The solar system has fallen, and the galaxy awaits. The Sol system has now gained admission to galactic society, a junior member held in little esteem, with obligations mounting. Emma and Anna seek to hold their society together as they come into new conflict with the Scythe....

title: Stratus Online: Awakening
author: Drew Cordell
description: Edwin Morris has been playing Sakarn Online almost his whole life. In fact, most people have. While he considers himself a skilled player, he never could really find the time to take his game to the next level and pay the bills....
